name: Fragment of Hellfire
descs:
Activates when using E.G.O Skills that apply [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn'.

Gain Final Power equal to (Wrath E.G.O resource + sum of other E.G.O resources/3) consumed and deal +50% damage

Wrath E.G.O Skills: Inflict additional [Combustion] Count based on E.G.O grades Before Attack(ZAYIN inflicts +2 Count, TETH inflicts +3 Count, HE inflicts +4 Count, and so on) and deal +(Atk Weight/# of attack targets x 20)% damage.
